content.en:
Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian went all out to crush this ultimate demon disciple.

This ultimate demon disciple was not stupid enough to fight Ye Tian to the end, seeing that he was not an opponent, he quickly fled after being injured.

Ye Tian didn't choose to hunt down this Ultimate Demon Disciple, his purpose was to obtain the Ultimate Demon Prison's chance treasure, not to kill the Ultimate Demon Disciple.

......

The depths of the ultimate hell.

An ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord named Zicha came here, his strength was much stronger than Ye Tian's, and he was among the top among the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords.

Moreover, this is not the first time he has come to the Ultimate Hell.

A long time ago, the Ultimate Demon Hell was opened once, and he survived the opening of the Ultimate Hell that time, and got enough opportunities, although he did not break through to the eternal level, but it also made his strength ~ skyrocket.

Therefore, he was very sure of saving his life this time and was not worried about his own safety.

"This is it!"

"I sensed the breath of the Ultimate Hell Stone here last time, but I gave up because there was an incomparably terrifying Ultimate Demon Disciple entrenched here, and the Ultimate Hell was about to close. "

"This time, the Ultimate Demon Disciple is not here, this is my hope!"

He continued to bombard this place, tearing apart the earth and the void here, searching for the existence of the ultimate Hell Stone.

Finally.

He had discovered the Ultimate Hell Stone, and there was more than one, each of which was incomparably huge.

"Hahaha, I made a lot of money this time!"

Purple Tea Jizun said excitedly.

Just as he was about to seize these Ultimate Demon Hell Stones, the Ultimate Demon Hell Void was torn apart, and another figure walked out and directly attacked the Purple Tea Ultimate Realm.

"Qiongyu Jizun, what are you going to do?"

Purple Tea Jizun said angrily.

Bang!!!!

The two sides collided and separated, and the strength was almost the same.

"Purple Tea Jizun, what do you say I'm going to do, so many Ultimate Demon Hell Stones, I naturally want to snatch them!" Qiong Yu Jizun said with a smile.

In an instant, the two were killed together.

They all want to monopolize these Ultimate Hell Stones, and it is impossible to divide them equally.

However, their strength is about the same, and if you want to divide the winner in a short period of time, it is almost impossible to do it.

And at this moment, another ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord appeared and tried to snatch these Ultimate Demon Hell Stones, but as a result, Qiongyu Jizun and Zicha Jizun both reacted in time and joined forces to strike a blow to shake them back.

Next, more and more Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters came here, and the situation became more and more complicated at this moment.

......

Soon.

Ye Tian also came here, but he didn't participate in it at the first time.

It hadn't been long since he had broken through to the ancient level, and although he had comprehended more than one ultimate rule, the realm of each ultimate rule was very low.

Compared to those top-level Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords, he was not an opponent yet.

Therefore, he has been secretly watching, and he is not the only one who is secretly watching the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord.

"The Ultimate Demon Hell Stone, no wonder they are all fighting desperately!"

Ye Tian understood it.

He also understands the treasure of the Ultimate Hell Stone, which is a very precious treasure in the Ultimate Hell Stone, which can not only be used to forge the ultimate weapon, but also has an important role, which is to extract a special substance from the inside of the Ultimate Hell Stone, so as to temper his ultimate will.

If the ultimate will is transformed again and again, it will transform into the ultimate will.

If the Eternal Level Existence wants to impact the Ultimate Extreme Honor, the first condition must be to have the Ultimate Will, if the will is still the Ultimate Will, if you want to break through the Ultimate Extreme Honor, it is almost certain death.

Therefore, every ancient-level and even eternal-level existence wants to complete the transformation of the ultimate will again and again, so as to transform into the ultimate will.

However.

At the level of the ancient level, the Ultimate Will itself is very strong, and it is so difficult to continue to improve, and the Ultimate Demon Hell Stone can strengthen and refine the Ultimate Will, which shows how high its value is.

Therefore, every Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord wanted to capture the Ultimate Demon Hell Stone.

Of course, just relying on these Ultimate Hell Stones, at most they can make the Ultimate Will transform a few more times, and it is almost impossible to directly transform into the Ultimate Will.

If they could rely on these Ultimate Hell Stones to transform the Ultimate Will into the Ultimate Will, then those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters would have already entered here to snatch the Ultimate Hell Stones.

As a result, they didn't come here, and apparently they still didn't think much of the opportunity here.

"The Ultimate Demon Hell Stone is also of great help to me!"

Ye Tian also wanted to snatch these Ultimate Hell Stones, but his strength was still weak, so he didn't want to snatch the Ultimate Hell Stones at all.

He gritted his teeth, but still held back, and left directly.

There's the Ultimate Hell Stone here, and maybe there's another Ultimate Hell Stone too!

There is no need to take risks here, if the copy body dies here, it is equivalent to exposing one of his hole cards, and the next time he appears, those ancient level ultimate realm masters will know that he has a special clone.

So, he's better keep a low profile!

Soon after, the battle for the Ultimate Demon Domain Stone was over, and Ye Tian also learned the information of this battle.

"Sixteen Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords have died!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

In just one resource grab, so many Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters were killed, which was really a heavy loss.

However, he also knew that the death of these ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters was not killing each other, but that many ancient-level Ultimate Demon Disciples had come over.

Otherwise, these Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters wouldn't have died so much.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian also finally found an Ultimate Demon Hell Stone.

"Finally got the Ultimate Hell Stone!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In addition to these treasures, he also gained other resources.

At the same time, he also discovered a treasure place that could assist in the comprehension of the ultimate rules, and there were also some other ancient level Ultimate Realm Masters who were also contemplating here.

But apparently he can't do it for too long, otherwise he will be transformed into the ultimate demon.

Ye Tian's copy body cultivated here, and he also condensed an ultimate demon copy body to continue to look for other opportunities in the ultimate demon prison.

Time flies.

The time for the closure of the Ultimate Demon Prison is getting closer and closer, and many fights for resources have been developed, coupled with the killing of the Ultimate Demon Disciples, many ancient level ultimate realm masters have suffered heavy losses, and many ancient level ultimate realm masters have died.
